---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or change
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Haldir doesn't currently support? What have you tried?

## The proposed solution

What behavior would you expect? If you can sketch an API, commands, or config, even better.

```python
# pseudo-code is fine
```

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds, other tools, or approaches you've tried that didn't fit.

## Context

- Use case (is this for a prod agent, a research project, a compliance requirement?)
- Framework you're using (LangChain / CrewAI / Vercel AI SDK / raw)
- Rough volume (how many agents, calls per day, etc.)

## Is this blocking you

- [ ] Yes — we can't ship without this
- [ ] No, but it would make our setup significantly cleaner
- [ ] Just a suggestion; no dependency
